title: Basic JavaScript Localization
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Localization. Focus on implementing Locale detection correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Localization
description: Create a function that uses Locale detection and Translation strategies together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Localization Project
description: Build a small application that applies Locale detection, Translation strategies, Intl API localization in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Localization
description: The following code has bugs related to Locale detection. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Localization
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Locale detection and Translation strategies.
